sizing_rule.note: Adjust position sizing by extending worst-case loss bounds from observed historical sigma (e.g., -2.96σ) to expected future worst-case (e.g., -4σ). Reduce position size proportionally: sizing_reduction_factor = new_lower_bound / historical_lower_bound. This is a Vince tail-risk adjustment applied to Optimal f calculations.

source_rule_text: Adjust position sizing bounds beyond historical worst-case losses by expecting future losses to exceed the worst sigma deviation observed in historical trade data, requiring downward adjustment of position size allocation.
